purpose: How to decide whether a line/action should survive cleanup as protected memory.
must_create_protected_moment_when: a phrase directly hits a character's fear, guilt, duty, attachment, wound or desire
a character receives unexpected kindness, protection, betrayal, humiliation or refusal
a promise, threat, confession, accusation or boundary is made
a first meeting creates a strong impression
a contradiction is noticed and may matter later
a character would logically remember it because of personality or role
do_not_create_for: scene descriptions no character specifically noticed
cleanup_rule: Cleanup may shorten protected moments but must not delete active ones.
If unsure, keep as a short hook.
